## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with zero errors
- [ ] Tests pass (`npx turbo test`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or PII in code or tests
- [ ] Security implications considered (SSRF, PII, injection, ReDoS)
- [ ] New exports added to barrel files (`src/index.ts`, `src/plugins/index.ts`)
